name: claude-code-internals
description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 90 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction (including marble-origami reversible collapse), MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion tool, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.120 (Claude Cowork's runtime infrastructure: /background + /bg + /stop background sessions forking the current main session into a kind:'fork' subagent, /daemon Ink TUI managing assistant/scheduled/remoteControl service categories, Fleet view = standalone 'claude agents' CLI subcommand mounting an Ink TUI dashboard with per-agent PR state tracking, /autocompact re-introduced with token-count argumentHint, session identity quartet CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_KIND/ID/NAME/LOG with bg|daemon|daemon-worker discriminator, worktree-isolation runtime prompt mutation, PTY recording via --bg-pty-host argv mode, classifier-summary status pipeline pushing notifyMetadataChanged({post_turn_summary}) to Cowork Desktop with heuristic/llm engine selection and three independent kill switches; CLAUDE_CODE_LEAN_PROMPT granular per-section prompt-shaping toggle distinct from CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE wholesale swap, CLAUDE_EFFORT skill-frontmatter field with template-substitution token ${CLAUDE_EFFORT} resolving to literal English phrases (low|medium|high|xhigh), CLAUDE_COWORK_MEMORY_GUIDELINES bypass form replacing entire memory pipeline, tengu_memory_write_survey_event Approve/Reject confirmation dialog with Sonnet-4.6 LLM-generated summary, CLAUDE_CODE_VERIFY_PROMPT debugging-workflow discipline injection, tengu_plan_mode_violated observability tripwire, persistent daemon install kill-switched in v2.1.120 with CLAUDE_CODE_DAEMON_COLD_START='transient'|'ask' on-demand-only model, daemon hot-upgrade self-restart, /fork background subagent inheriting full conversation + 'f' keybinding + implicit fork subagent type, CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT env + tengu_copper_fox GB flag + CLAUDE_BRIDGE_REATTACH_SESSION/SEQ bridge plumbing, /cost and /stats folded into /usage aliases with dual interactive/headless registrations, cache-diagnosis-2026-04-07 prompt cache diagnostics API beta with graceful server-reject, frontmatter shadow validator emitting tengu_frontmatter_shadow telemetry, WIF user-OAuth advisory file-locking, dark-launched /pro-trial-expired, CLAUDE_CODE_RATE_LIMIT_TIER/SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE overrides, OIDC Federation enterprise auth with credentials-file profiles, CLAUDE_CODE_HTTP(S)_PROXY fallbacks with downstream npm/yarn/docker/Java propagation, /model headless mode, server-side Advisor Tool, PushNotification + KAIROS mobile push, Context Hint API server-driven micro-compaction, Fullscreen TUI with /focus /tui and DECSTBM scrolling regions, Proxy Auth Helper, System Prompt GB Override, /fewer-permission-prompts, canary channel, slow first-byte watchdog, async-agent stall watchdog, Remote Workflow Commands /autopilot /bugfix /dashboard /docs /investigate sunset in v2.1.113).
